title: Wooded ack: onboarding-expert verdict + 5 edits landed; ONBOARDING.md markdownlint-clean; awaiting owner confirm before enqueue
body:
Wooded Flowering Leaf (f03dbd, Implementor) — onboarding-expert verdict + integration landed in working tree.

## What happened
- Onboarding-expert subagent (Sonnet per fold-check standing direction) returned a P0-fix-needed verdict: every `/jc-*` slash-command token in the draft was Jim-personal-prefix, not the repo-canonical `/oak-*` prefix. A new teammate pasting the draft would hit "command not found" on every command. Quiet failure mode worth surfacing.
- All five recommended edits applied to `ONBOARDING.md` (repo root, fresh file, no source-tree contention):
  1. Prefix rename `jc-*` → `oak-*` across Top Skills and Skills-to-Know-About lists.
  2. MCP list corrected: added `oak-prod` (alpha curriculum MCP), split `sentry` into project-scoped `sentry-ooc-mcp` / `sentry-ooc-search-cli`, pointed to `docs/engineering/mcp-servers-for-contributors.md` as canonical.
  3. Team Tips section filled (6 tips, none duplicating `.agent/rules/` or `AGENT.md`).
  4. Get Started section filled (5 steps; routes through `.agent/plans/good-first-issues.md` and `/oak-start-right-quick`).
  5. Headline framing clarified that the usage numbers are Jim's personal figures (the HTML walkthrough block already cautioned about this; tightened the prose).
- Markdownlint clean (MD022 + MD032 + MD034 cures: blank-line-after-`### Codebases`, lists surrounded, GitHub URLs angle-bracketed).
- Claude Code onboarding-share link refreshed (mode='update' against short_code `sm9ZLFNSjmFr`).

## What did NOT happen
- No source-tree work. Boundary stayed at repo root `ONBOARDING.md` only.
- No comms-substrate edits, no plan/rule/skill edits, no `.agent/` substrate touch.
- Did not absorb the Hushed missing-landing-broadcast surface (different lane; Misty surfaced softly to Hushed as substrate-care reminder).
- Did not contend for the cycle commit queue. Cycle 9 (Eclipsed) + Cycle 10 (Eclipsed-after-9) sequencing is undisturbed.

## Commit intent
Ready to enqueue `ONBOARDING.md` (single file, repo root) when owner confirms the integration is what they want. Subject draft: `docs(onboarding): add team onboarding guide with verified skill + MCP set` (74ch, under header-max-length). Will format per Hushed's pre-flight checklist (Co-Authored-By format with identity tuple, body lines ≤100ch, blank line before trailer). Will enqueue via `pnpm agent-tools:commit-queue enqueue` with explicit pathspec; Hushed will marshal-cycle FIFO.

## Open question to owner
The original `/team-onboarding` skill flow has three Review questions (team name, starter task, team tips). Team name resolved (Oak Open Curriculum Ecosystem). Starter task + team tips were resolved by the onboarding-expert integration — but owner gets the final word before commit. Awaiting confirm-to-commit (or revisions).

— Wooded Flowering Leaf / f03dbd (Implementor)
